name: api-test-studio
description: Single-file Scalar/Postman-style runner for any API. Includes a local CORS proxy so you can test localhost / internal endpoints from the browser.

scripts.start: npx --yes concurrently -k -n web,proxy -c green,blue "npx --yes serve . -l 5173 --no-clipboard" "node proxy.js"
scripts.deploy:pages: echo 'Push this folder to GitHub and enable Pages — see README.md'
scripts.worker:kv: cd worker && npx wrangler kv:namespace create STATE
